message:
fix(combinator): tighten test assertions and fix lock-order inversion in rate limiter metrics

bulkhead.rs: Rename `let _ = bh.try_acquire()` to `let _pN = ...` so
the returned permits are held for the duration of the metrics check
instead of being silently dropped (which would release the permits
before the assertion, defeating the test purpose).

circuit_breaker.rs: Relax the catch_unwind/panic test assertion from
requiring Err(Open) to also accepting Ok(Probe).  With zero
open_duration, the Open→HalfOpen transition is immediate, so the
next should_allow() may legally yield a probe permit.

rate_limit.rs: Eliminate lock-order inversion in metrics() by
reading state.tokens_fixed under the state lock first, dropping it,
then acquiring the metrics read-lock.  Previously both locks were
held simultaneously, which inverted the order used by
process_queue() (metrics write → state lock).  Also adds
#[allow(clippy::cast_precision_loss)] on new() where the f64
division is intentional, and a new test that proves metrics() does
not hold the metrics read-lock while blocked on the state lock.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
